# Alberta Solar Advisors

> Residential solar installation for Alberta homeowners. Transparent proposals, CEIP-ready documentation, and no-pressure estimates.

Alberta Solar Advisors is a lead generation brand operated by Simple Tree Digital on behalf of Orizon Energy Inc., a residential solar installer serving 12 cities across Alberta. The brand focuses on helping homeowners understand solar economics, available financing programs, and the installation process before committing to anything.

## Core Facts

- 1,355+ Alberta homes and businesses served
- Average savings: up to $3,000/year, $45,000+ over system lifetime
- Standard 8 kW system: ~$25,000, ~10,200 kWh/year production
- Alberta all-in electricity rate: ~18 cents/kWh, ~2.5% annual escalation
- Break-even: typically years 11-13 with CEIP, 13-15 without
- Phone: (825) 602-5155
- Email: Info@mail.solar-resource.org
- Booking: book.alberta-solar.org

## Service Cities

Edmonton, Calgary, Red Deer, Lethbridge, Airdrie, St. Albert, Sherwood Park, Spruce Grove, Medicine Hat, Grande Prairie, Fort McMurray, Slave Lake

## Key Financing Programs

- CEIP (Clean Energy Improvement Program): 3.75% property tax financing, up to $50,000, 20-year term
  - Currently open: Edmonton, Lethbridge, Airdrie, St. Albert, Medicine Hat, Strathcona County
  - Currently paused: Calgary, Spruce Grove, Grande Prairie
  - Portal: ceip.abmunis.ca
- ENMAX Solar Club (Calgary only): $0.30/kWh export May-Oct, $0.0877/kWh Nov-Apr
- Alberta Net Billing: retail rate credits (~18 cents/kWh), 12-month rollover, all distributors

## Electricity Distributors by City

- EPCOR: Edmonton, St. Albert
- FortisAlberta: Red Deer, Lethbridge, Airdrie, Sherwood Park, Spruce Grove, Grande Prairie
- ENMAX: Calgary
- ATCO Electric: Fort McMurray, Slave Lake, northern regions
- Municipal utility: Medicine Hat

## Pages

- /: Homepage with overview, financing table, case study teasers, service area grid
- /financing/: Financing options overview with ROI chart
- /financing/ceip/: CEIP program detail, city status table, application guide
- /financing/greener-homes-loan/: Greener Homes Loan (ended), alternatives
- /incentives/: Incentives overview
- /incentives/net-billing/: Net billing framework, rate tables, FAQs
- /incentives/the-solar-club/: ENMAX Solar Club detail, rate cards
- /case-study/: Case study overview
- /case-study/edmonton/: 8.4 kW, year-12 break-even
- /case-study/airdrie/: 9.6 kW, CEIP-financed, day-one positive cash flow
- /case-study/beaumont/: 12 kW ground mount, net-zero electricity
- /locations/: All 12 service cities with CEIP status
- /services/: Solar panels, battery storage, duct sealing
- /blog/: Solar energy insights for Alberta homeowners
- /about/: Team, stats, local focus
- /contact/: Inline survey, map, contact details
